hero.subtitle: More than chat. AI agents manage your Notes, schedule events, send emails, organize files, and search the web — multiple agents collaborate to get things done.

providers.title: 13 Providers, One SDK
providers.subtitle: First-class support for Chinese LLMs and all major providers. Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works.

coordinator.title: Coordinator-Worker
coordinator.description: Only spawn workers when needed. Simple queries get direct responses — no wasted tokens.

providers.title: 13 LLM Providers
providers.description: GLM, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, ERNIE, Claude, GPT, Gemini, and more. Switch at runtime.

cost.title: Cost Control
cost.description: Per-task model selection. Use cheap models for exploration, powerful models for code changes.

permissions.title: Permission Layers
permissions.description: Read-only explore agents, full-access general agents. Security by architecture.

skills.title: Skill System
skills.description: Markdown-based skills with YAML frontmatter. Compatible with agentskills.io ecosystem.

monitoring.title: Built-in Monitoring
monitoring.description: Heartbeat, stall detection, abort signals. Long-running agents never go silent.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Four-layer design: Client → Server → Agent → Infrastructure.

quickStart.title: Get Started
quickStart.subtitle: Three steps to let AI work for you.

step1.title: Download & Install
step1.description: Available for macOS / Windows / Linux. Pick your platform above.

step2.title: Configure AI
step2.description: Open Hive, pick a provider, and enter your API key. Supports GLM, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, Claude, GPT, and more.

step3.title: Start Talking
step3.description: Tell Hive what you need — it automatically assigns multiple agents to collaborate and get it done.
